title: FocusFlash
text: FocusFlash Determines whether a flashing rectangle indicates where the keyboard focus is when it is on a button or image. FocusFlash = on | off Default value on File section [upi] Description This setting is not supported by the Check Box widget. Related Links Use Detail Trigger This property determines whether the detail trigger (as opposed to the valueChanged trigger) is activated when the user clicks the widget. Was this topic helpful?
